zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter FitzRobert Baron of Little Dunmow於大約1219年出生在英國艾可武德哈姆 沃爾特時，他的父親Lord Robert FitzWalter53歲，母親Rohese Baynard40歲。他於大約1235年與Ida Longespée The Younger在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1258年4月10日之前在英國英格蘭艾可武德哈姆 沃爾特，埋葬在英國艾可蕾托 登莫福。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Walter FitzRobert Baron of Little Dunmow于大约1219年出生在英国艾可武德哈姆 沃爾特时，他的父亲Lord Robert FitzWalter53岁，母亲Rohese Baynard40岁。他于大约1235年与Ida Longespée The Younger在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1258年4月10日之前在英国英格兰艾可武德哈姆 沃爾特，埋葬在英国艾可蕾托 登莫福。

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Walter FitzRobert Baron of Little Dunmow was born about 1219, in Woodham Walter, Essex, England, his father, Lord Robert FitzWalter, was 53 and his mother, Rohese Baynard, was 40. He married Ida Longespée The Younger about 1235, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died before 10 April 1258, in Woodham Walter, Essex, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Little Dunmow, Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walter FitzRobert Baron of Little Dunmow est né environ 1219, à Woodham Walter, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Lord Robert FitzWalter, avait 53 ans et sa mère, Rohese Baynard, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Ida Longespée The Younger environ 1235, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé avant 10 avril 1258, à Woodham Walter, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterré à Little Dunmow, Essex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Walter FitzRobert Baron of Little Dunmow um 1219 in Woodham Walter, Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord Robert FitzWalter 53 und seine Mutter Rohese Baynard 40. Er hat um 1235 in England, United Kingdom Ida Longespée The Younger geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb vor 10. April 1258 in Woodham Walter, Essex, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Little Dunmow, Essex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Walter FitzRobert Baron of Little Dunmow è nato il circa 1219 nel Woodham Walter, Essex, England, il suo padre, Lord Robert FitzWalter, aveva 53 anni e il suo madre, Rohese Baynard, aveva 40 anni. Lui sposato Ida Longespée The Younger circa 1235, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì prima del 10 aprile 1258, nel Woodham Walter, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolto a Little Dunmow, Essex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Walter FitzRobert Baron of Little Dunmowが約1219年にイギリスエセックスウッドハム ワルターで生まれた時，父Lord Robert FitzWalterは53歳，母Rohese Baynardは40歳であった。約1235年にイギリスイギリスでIda Longespée The Youngerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1258年4月10日以前にイギリスイギリスエセックスウッドハム ワルターで死去し，イギリスエセックスリットル ダンモウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Walter FitzRobert Baron of Little Dunmow(이)가 대략 1219년 영국 에세스 우드함 월터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord Robert FitzWalter(은)는 53세였고, 그의 어머니 Rohese Baynard(은)는 40세였다. 그는 대략 1235년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Ida Longespée The Younger(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1258년 4월 10일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 우드함 월터에서 사망했으며 영국 에세스 리틀 던모에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Walter FitzRobert Baron of Little Dunmow nasceu aproximadamente 1219, em Woodham Walter, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Lord Robert FitzWalter, tinha 53 anos e sua mãe, Rohese Baynard, tinha 40 anos. Ele casou-se com Ida Longespée The Younger aproximadamente 1235, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 10 de abril de 1258, em Woodham Walter, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultado em Little Dunmow, Essex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter FitzRobert Baron of Little Dunmow родился около 1219 г. в местности вудхам валтир, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Lord Robert FitzWalter было 53 года, а матери, которую звали Rohese Baynard, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Ida Longespée The Younger около 1235 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер перед 10 апрель 1258 г. в местности вудхам валтир, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания и был похоронен в местности литл дунмоу, эссекс, Англия.
